expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves component-stack constraints, embedding lifecycle assumptions, and integration-sensitive customer expectations
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly scopes the case focus as Phase 1 context intake preserving: "1) component-stack constraints 2) embedding lifecycle assumptions 3) integration-sensitive customer expectations" and then covers each in dedicated sections: "A) Component-stack constraints", "B) Embedding lifecycle assumptions", and "C) Integration-sensitive customer expectations", including customer signal "CVS Pharmacy, Inc. – CS0928640" and integration/stack signals like labels "Embedding_SDK" and "Library_and_Dashboards".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md is framed as "Phase 1 Contract Check" and stays within Phase 1 contract language: "Phase 1 is limited to: generating one spawn request per requested source family... producing phase1_spawn_manifest.json...
